# Qt-LogViewer Wiki

## Overview
Qt-LogViewer is a Qt-based desktop application designed to open, view, search, and filter large log files efficiently. It supports multiple views, per-view filters, pagination for large datasets, and session management for saving and restoring workspaces. The application features a file explorer for grouping logs by application and session, with asynchronous data loading to maintain UI responsiveness.
